subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of existence and Educator of the unseen and the seen! Thou beholdest me seated beneath the canopy of Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الوجود و مربی الغیب و الشهود ترانی قاعدا تحت خباء قضلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
